purpose.fact: The independent strict goal-validity rule is safe but inert, while the default unique-strong identity rule is nontrivial but unsafe.
purpose.agent_inference: The next observation should collect contrastive evidence between rival candidates instead of adding another single-candidate confidence threshold.

planner_design.rule: For each request_discriminative_rival_view row, select one focus candidate and one or more confusing rivals using action-time evidence: strong candidate if present, otherwise highest own support; rivals ranked by cross support, own support, semantic rank, and proximity in the planned target set.
planner_design.blocked: Do not select pairs by evaluation correctness.

planner_design.rule: Try a navmesh-snapped common standoff viewpoint around the midpoint or perpendicular axis of the focus-rival pair so both candidate projections can be compared under the same camera context.
planner_design.fallback: If no common view is navigable, create matched dual standoff views with the same heading policy and explicit pair candidate ids.

planner_design.rule: Every exported frame row must carry only the focus/rival pair candidate ids for detector association, plus optional local-context ids recorded separately for analysis.
planner_design.blocked: Do not let detector association silently expand to unrelated category candidates.

planner_design.rule: Write pair-level evidence that compares support under matched views: focus own support, rival own support, cross support, box/mask/depth consistency, and whether either candidate remains unsupported.
